title: Build core platform database schema
description: Create SQLite database using SQLAlchemy. Save models to platform/src/models/models.py with these tables: clients (id, name, email, phone), points_balances (id, client_id, program_name, balance), award_searches (id, client_id, origin, destination, cabin, status), booking_pipeline (id, client_id, airline, route, cabin, miles_required, status). Also create a seed script at platform/src/migrations/seed.py that inserts 3 sample clients with points balances across Amex, Chase, and United.
completion_summary: I built the core platform database schema using SQLAlchemy and created a seed script to insert sample data. The database schema includes tables for clients, points balances, award searches, and booking pipeline. The seed script inserts 3 sample clients with points balances across Amex, Chase, and United.
